headline: Is It Time To Reassess Confluent (CFLT) After The Pending IBM Takeover Offer
summary: If you are wondering whether Confluent's current share price lines up with its real worth, you are not alone. The stock has drawn attention from investors trying to work out what a fair valuation looks like. Over the short term the share price has been relatively steady, with a 0.3% decline over the last 7 days and a 0.5% gain over 30 days. The longer term picture shows a 1.9% return year to date, 16.4% over 1 year and 40.2% over 3 years. Recent headlines around Confluent have focused on its...
